quality_policy.notes: Primary 3B-token production builds should use top-engine self-play or elite human tournament/player subsets. General public archives are not primary training sources unless a strict top-player/top-engine filter is documented in the source entry.

chess.name: Stockfish fishtest LTC PGNs
chess.notes: About one billion Stockfish LTC games with engine eval/depth comments and metadata. Best verified volume source for chess; prefer before lower-quality human data.

chess.name: Leela Chess Zero self-play training PGNs
chess.license: verify Lc0 data license and attribution before redistribution
chess.notes: Superhuman neural-engine self-play. Mix with Stockfish fishtest to reduce single-engine style bias; keep network/run metadata in shard manifests.

chess.name: TCEC engine championship PGNs
chess.license: CC BY-SA 3.0 for PGN game files
chess.notes: Highest-profile engine tournament games. Very high quality but too small for 3B tokens; use as evaluation, seed, and style-diversity mix.

chess.name: Lichess Elite Database
chess.notes: Filtered Lichess standard games by strong-player rating thresholds with bullet excluded. Prefer over raw Lichess for human-style top play.

chess.name: Raw Lichess standard rated games
chess.license: database.lichess.org terms / CC0-style public database notice
chess.notes: Do not use unfiltered for primary training. Only use with explicit rating/time-control/cheat-filter gates or for robustness/evaluation studies.

shogi.name: AobaZero self-play CSA archives
shogi.license: verify upstream redistribution terms before mirroring raw records
shogi.notes: Primary move-only source. AlphaZero-style engine self-play; preserve network/run provenance and checksums.

shogi.name: dlshogi / DeepLearningShogi generated training records
shogi.license: verify each released archive or developer-provided link before redistribution
shogi.notes: GCT/dlshogi training archives include large hcpe3 self-play/evaluation data. Treat as candidate-primary only after concrete file availability, license, and hcpe-to-move-stream reconstruction are verified.

shogi.name: Floodgate yearly archives
shogi.license: public floodgate archive; preserve provenance and checksums
shogi.notes: Do not use wholesale. Use only with a documented engine-name/rating/date allowlist for top engines; otherwise keep for evaluation and coverage audits.

go.name: KataGo distributed self-play training data
go.license: verify katagotraining.org data-use policy before redistribution
go.notes: Primary Go source. Public stats show tens of millions of training games and billions of rows; retain run/network/rules/game-type metadata and prefer standard 19x19 normal/rating games for MahjongLM-like move streams.

go.name: ZhiziGo KataGo self-play mirror
go.license: MIT per dataset card; verify before redistribution
go.notes: Large modern KataGo-format self-play mirror. Use as a practical bulk source if conversion from KataGo training format to SGF/move stream is implemented and validated.

go.name: Joe's Go Database
go.notes: More than 500k professional/top-amateur SGFs. Good human-style seed/evaluation corpus; not enough for 3B tokens.

go.name: OGS public SGF collection
go.license: research/AI training stated by corpus maintainer; verify before redistribution
go.notes: Do not use unfiltered for primary training. Only use with strict rank filters or for robustness/evaluation.

othello.name: Egaroucid self-play training data
othello.notes: Public Othello AI self-play training data is available from Egaroucid releases/docs. Prefer over random legal-move datasets; convert to terminal move streams with replay validation.

othello.name: Edax high-depth self-play generation
othello.license: generated records can be owned by this project; verify Edax engine license for redistribution of binaries/configs
othello.notes: Primary volume path. Generate deterministic self-play with fixed engine version, depth/time settings, opening seed policy, and validation replay.

othello.name: Solved-line / perfect-play Othello seeds
othello.license: derive from cited solved-game publication/artifacts only after license review
othello.notes: Othello is weakly solved as a draw under perfect play. Use solved lines and deviations as tiny gold evaluation/anchor sets, not as volume data.

othello.name: WTHOR tournament database
othello.license: verify French Federation of Othello/WTHOR terms before redistribution
othello.notes: High-quality human tournament seed/evaluation set, but too small for 3B tokens by itself.

othello.name: Random/synthetic public Othello datasets
othello.license: verify each dataset card before redistribution
othello.notes: Do not use for policy imitation if generated by random legal moves. Useful only for board-state representation or legality diagnostics.

poker.name: PHH full corpus ACPC public subsets
poker.license: MIT for GitHub subset; verify Zenodo full corpus license and ACPC redistribution constraints
poker.notes: Use ACPC engine competition hands from the full corpus. Filter by path/metadata before tokenization; generic online hand histories are not primary.

poker.name: Pluribus released hands in PHH-compatible corpus
poker.license: verify Brown and Sandholm supplementary data terms
poker.notes: Very high quality but small compared with 3B-token target; use as top-quality seed/evaluation or mix with ACPC.

poker.name: Generic online poker hand histories in PHH corpus
poker.notes: Do not use unfiltered for primary policy training; stakes and player quality are mixed.

bridge.name: OpenSpiel bridge generated data / WBridge5-style benchmarks
bridge.license: verify OpenSpiel dataset/model license and generated-record terms
bridge.notes: OpenSpiel bridge work references generated bridge data. Prefer only if full auction+play reconstruction and convention metadata can be validated.

bridge.name: WBridge5 / RoboBridge high-quality self-play generation
bridge.license: verify engine license and generated-record redistribution terms
bridge.notes: Primary volume path if engine automation is available. Store engine version, convention card, deal seed, DDS/settings, and validation checks.

bridge.name: DDS-assisted double-dummy play generation
bridge.license: verify dds-bridge/dds license and generated-record terms
bridge.notes: Use for omniscient play-quality generation and validation, not as a replacement for single-dummy bidding unless paired with a strong bidding engine.

bridge.name: Vugraph Project / ComputerBridge PBN finals
bridge.license: verify event and archive redistribution terms before mirroring raw records
bridge.notes: World Championship, NABC, Bermuda Bowl, Venice Cup, Vanderbilt and other top event PBN files. High-quality seed, but too small for 3B tokens alone.

bridge.name: BBO/Vugraph public archives
bridge.license: verify BBO/Vugraph terms before bulk redistribution
bridge.notes: Use only with event/player filters for top-level broadcast matches; convert LIN to PBN before ingestion and preserve event provenance.
